title: Unable to set cell value as Number
author: klub-kapil
body:
I am encountering an issue while inputting a numerical value into a cell using the command: 
cell.value = 1234. 

However, when I subsequently check the cell type in my Excel file, it is automatically being recognized as a string. This is not aligning with my expectations and seems to indicate a potential problem with the feature.

comments.author: sun
comments.body:
I thought I had the same issue, but simply did not realize that `Number.toFixed()` is returning a string.

Fixed it by setting values as numbers and applying a `style: { numFmt: '0.0' }` for the column.
